# Canyon Strategic Wealth

> Canyon Strategic Wealth is a fee-based, fiduciary private wealth advisory firm and virtual family office in Bountiful, Utah, serving high-net-worth families and business owners. It acts as a strategic quarterback, coordinating investment management, financial planning, tax strategy, estate planning, and risk management.

Canyon Strategic Wealth, LLC is a Registered Investment Adviser led by Jake Cazier, CFP. The firm operates as a virtual family office: rather than managing each part of a family's financial life in isolation, it coordinates investments, taxes, estate planning, insurance, and planning alongside the client's other professionals, such as CPAs and attorneys.

## Key facts

- Firm: Canyon Strategic Wealth, LLC, a Registered Investment Adviser (RIA)
- Lead advisor: Jake Cazier, CERTIFIED FINANCIAL PLANNER (CFP) professional
- Office: 450 S 400 E, Bountiful, UT 84010
- Serves: high-net-worth families and business owners, primarily across Bountiful, Salt Lake City, and the greater Wasatch Front in Utah
- In practice since 2017; more than 100 families served
- Assets under management: $90M+ (as of 2026)
- Standard of care: a fiduciary at all times; fee-based compensation
- Custodian: client assets are custodied at Charles Schwab
- Contact: jake@canyonstrategicwealth.com, (801) 903-8287

## Services

- Investment Management
- Financial Planning
- Tax Strategy
- Estate Planning
- Risk Management
- Business Owner Advisory

## What a virtual family office means

A virtual family office delivers the comprehensive, coordinated wealth management that ultra-high-net-worth families receive from a traditional in-house family office, without the overhead of a dedicated team. Canyon Strategic Wealth serves as the client's strategic quarterback, coordinating across investments, taxes, estate planning, and insurance so every part of the plan works together.

## Links

- [Canyon Strategic Wealth website](https://canyonstrategicwealth.com/): firm overview, services, process, and team
- [Schedule a discovery call](https://canyonstrategicwealth.com/schedule): complimentary 30-minute introductory conversation, with a short qualifying form or direct calendar booking

## Disclosures

Canyon Strategic Wealth, LLC is a Registered Investment Adviser. Registration does not imply a certain level of skill or training. Past performance is not indicative of future results; all investing involves risk, including the possible loss of principal. The firm does not provide tax or legal advice. See https://canyonstrategicwealth.com for full disclosures.
